tabMode.title: Bottom tabs
tabMode.subtitle: Customer shows browse and wallet. Business shows create, redeem, and your offers.

emptyState.encouragement: No worries — more deals will pop up soon.

dealsBrowse.categoryHint: Tip: businesses that set a category in Account → business profile show up as filter chips here.
dealsBrowse.nearMeCaption: Uses GPS to sort by distance when businesses set coordinates on their profile; otherwise matches city/region text in Location.
dealsBrowse.nearMeHelp: Tap again to clear. Matches city/region text in profile locations.
dealsBrowse.nearMeCoordsOnly: Sorted by distance when businesses publish coordinates; add city text in Location as a fallback.
dealsBrowse.nearMeDenied: Location permission is needed for Near me.
dealsBrowse.nearMeNoHints: Could not detect your area. Try again or search manually.
dealsBrowse.emptyNearMeMessage: No deals matched your area against business profile locations. Clear Near me or ask businesses to add a location.
dealsBrowse.emptySearchMessage: Try different words or clear the search box.
dealsBrowse.emptyMessage: Create a business and post your first deal.
dealsBrowse.emptyFilterMessage: Try another category or clear the filter.

favorites.emptyMessage: Favorite a business to see deals here.

consumerHome.shopsSubtitle: Browse cafés and bakeries near you.
consumerHome.tagline: Live local deals · claim in one tap · redeem with QR
consumerHome.sortingHintNoLocation: Set location in Settings to sort by distance.
consumerHome.radiusHint: Notifications & sorting use a {{miles}} mi radius (change in Settings).
consumerHome.emptyNearbyTitle: No live deals near you right now
consumerHome.emptyNearbyBody: No live deals nearby right now — check back soon!
consumerHome.ctaFavoriteHint: Favorite places you love — you can get alerts even when they’re outside your radius.
consumerHome.emptyLiveBody: Check back soon or switch to the Shops tab to browse.
consumerHome.emptyBusinessesBody: When businesses join TWOFER, they’ll show up here.
consumerHome.loadDealsError: We couldn’t load live deals. Try again in a moment.
consumerHome.errFavoriteToggle: Couldn’t update your favorites. Please try again.
consumerHome.loadBusinessesError: We couldn’t load businesses. Pull to refresh or try again in a moment.
consumerHome.guestBannerBody: Sign in to claim deals, use your wallet, and keep QR tickets. You can still browse listings.
consumerHome.favoriteAlertsHint: Favorites can unlock alerts for new deals.
consumerHome.emptyNearbyBodySub: No live deals nearby right now — check back soon!
consumerHome.emptyNearbyPenguinHint: Your penguin scout is still waddling for offers.
consumerHome.emptyZeroTitle: No deals yet — be the first
consumerHome.emptyZeroBody: Live deals pop up throughout the day. Favorite cafes and bakeries you love, and we'll alert you the moment one drops a deal nearby.
consumerHome.emptyZeroPenguinHint: More cafes are joining the pilot every week — your favorites help us bring them to your area.

consumerMap.title: Map
consumerMap.subtitleAll: Every business on TWOFER with a map pin.
consumerMap.subtitleLive: Only spots with a live offer right now.
consumerMap.webFallback: Map view is available on the iOS and Android apps. Use Home to browse lists on web.
consumerMap.dataError: Some map data couldn’t load. Pins may be incomplete.
consumerMap.emptyMarkersBody: Businesses need coordinates on their profile to appear on the map. You can still browse on Home.
consumerMap.androidMapsUnavailableTitle: Map isn’t available in this build
consumerMap.androidMapsUnavailableBody: This Android install was built without a Google Maps key, so the map can’t open safely. Browse deals on Home, or install an update after maps are configured for builds.
consumerMap.a11yRefreshHint: Reload businesses and live deals on the map
consumerMap.a11yToggleAllHint: Show every business on the map
consumerMap.a11yToggleLiveHint: Show only businesses with a live deal

consumerSettings.accountCtaSub: Log in, switch to business mode, or edit your business profile.
consumerSettings.locationHelp: Live GPS is best for distance and maps. If you prefer not to share location, use a ZIP code.
consumerSettings.zipInvalid: Use a valid 5-digit US ZIP (optional ZIP+4).
consumerSettings.zipLookupFail: We couldn’t verify that ZIP. Check the code and your connection, then try again.
consumerSettings.radiusHelp: Used for sorting, map ring, and “all nearby” deal alerts (default 3 mi).
consumerSettings.notificationsHelp: Turn on alerts to hear about new deals. You can narrow to favorites only anytime.
consumerSettings.gpsErrorBody: Could not get your current position. Try again or switch to ZIP code.
consumerSettings.notifFavoritesOverride: Favorited businesses can alert you even when they’re outside your radius.

onboarding.title: Welcome to TWOFER
onboarding.subtitle: Find real-time local deals, save favorites, and redeem with QR.
onboarding.introBody: TWOFER shows live offers from nearby businesses. Save places you like, claim in one tap, and keep tickets in your wallet.
onboarding.locationBody: We use your general area to sort nearby deals and improve alerts. You can switch to ZIP later in Settings.
onboarding.zipBody: We’ll use this to estimate your area for distance and alerts.
onboarding.locationDenied: Location wasn’t shared. You can enter a ZIP code instead.
onboarding.locationError: Couldn’t read your location. Try ZIP or Settings later.
onboarding.zipGeocodeFail: We couldn’t find that ZIP. Check the code and try again.
onboarding.zipInvalidFormat: Enter a valid 5-digit US ZIP code (optional +4).
onboarding.zipLookupFail: We couldn’t look up that ZIP right now. Check your connection and try again.
onboarding.radiusBody: We’ll prioritize deals within this distance. You can still browse everything.
onboarding.notifyBody: Get a heads-up when new deals go live near you. You can change this anytime in Settings.
onboarding.favoriteHint: Tip: favorite businesses you care about — they can ping you even outside your radius.

businessProfile.title: Business
businessProfile.mapsUnavailable: Add an address or map pin to this business to open directions.
businessProfile.noLiveDeal: No live deal right now. Check back later or save this business for alerts.

apiErrors.rateLimit30s: Too many attempts. Try again in 30 seconds.
apiErrors.claimNotStarted: This deal has not started yet.
apiErrors.claimRecurringMisconfigured: This deal is not configured correctly.
apiErrors.claimNotActiveToday: This deal is not active today.
apiErrors.claimInvalidWindow: This deal has an invalid time window.
apiErrors.claimNotActiveNow: This deal is not active right now.
apiErrors.claimWindowClosed: Claiming has closed for today's window.
apiErrors.claimDuplicateActive: You already have an active claim for this deal
apiErrors.claimActiveOtherDeal: You already have an active claim from this business. Redeem or wait for it to expire before claiming another offer.
apiErrors.claimActiveAppWide: You already have an active claim. Redeem it or wait until it expires before claiming another deal.
apiErrors.claimDailyLimitBusiness: You can only claim once per business per local day while your claim is still redeemable. Redeem it or wait until it expires before claiming another deal from this business.
apiErrors.claimHourlyLimit: You can only claim one deal per hour. Please try again shortly.
apiErrors.claimSoldOut: This deal has reached its claim limit.
apiErrors.redeemUnauthorized: Unauthorized. Please log in as a business owner.
apiErrors.redeemNotBusinessOwner: You must be a business owner to redeem tokens.
apiErrors.redeemTokenOrCodeMissing: Enter a claim code or scan a QR.
apiErrors.redeemInvalidCode: That claim code doesn’t match an active ticket.
apiErrors.redeemTokenWrongBusiness: This token does not belong to your business
apiErrors.redeemTokenAlreadyUsed: This token has already been redeemed
apiErrors.claimWrongUser: This claim does not belong to you
apiErrors.redeemCannotUseNow: This claim cannot be used right now
apiErrors.redeemStartFailed: Could not start redemption. Try again.
apiErrors.redeemCompleteFailed: Could not complete redemption. Try again.
apiErrors.redeemNotStarted: Redemption was not started for this claim
apiErrors.redeemSessionExpired: Redemption session expired. Start again from your wallet.
apiErrors.redeemWindowNotFinished: Redemption window has not finished yet
apiErrors.aiAdsMissingFields: Missing business, photo, or offer note.
apiErrors.photoAccessFailed: Couldn’t open the photo. Upload again.
apiErrors.aiOpenaiNotConfigured: AI isn’t configured on the server yet.
apiErrors.aiInvalidJson: AI returned invalid data. Try again.
apiErrors.aiInvalidAds: AI returned an invalid set of ads. Try again.
apiErrors.aiResponseInvalid: AI response was invalid. Try again.
apiErrors.aiRegenerationLimit: Regeneration limit reached. Edit below or start a new offer.
apiErrors.dbRlsViolation: You don’t have permission for this action.
apiErrors.dbDuplicate: This already exists. Refresh and try again.
apiErrors.dbForeignKey: That reference isn’t valid. Refresh and try again.
apiErrors.dbCheckViolation: Some data didn’t pass validation. Check your inputs.
apiErrors.networkFailed: Network error. Check your connection and try again.

dealQuality.strongDealMessage: TWOFER deals need to be at least 40% off or give something free. Try BOGO, 2-for-1, or buy a coffee, get a muffin free.

blocks.TITLE_SHORT: Title is too short — customers need to see the value right away. Try something like 2-for-1 lattes or Free muffin with any coffee.
blocks.MULTI_PERCENT: Multiple discounts can confuse customers. Pick one clear headline: BOGO, 2-for-1, or a single strong percentage.
blocks.BELOW_THRESHOLD: Deals under 40% off won't stand out. Try BOGO, 2-for-1, or bump the discount to 40%+.
blocks.CLARIFY_VALUE: Spell out the value — e.g. free drink with any sandwich or 2 for $10. Customers should get it at a glance.

strongGuard.conditional: Buy X + % off Y deals don't qualify. Try making the second item free instead!
strongGuard.low_percent: Discounts under 40% won't attract enough foot traffic. Try BOGO, 2-for-1, or at least 40% off.
strongGuard.no_strong_language: Make it irresistible! Try BOGO, 2-for-1, buy one get one free, or 40%+ off.

dealDraft.unsavedBody: You have unsaved deal details. Leave without saving?

createQuick.title: Quick Deal
createQuick.loginPrompt: Please log in to create deals.
createQuick.errMaxClaims: Max claims must be greater than 0.
createQuick.errCutoff: Cutoff buffer must be 0 or more.
createQuick.errEndFuture: End time must be in the future.
createQuick.errCutoffDuration: Cutoff must be less than the deal duration.
createQuick.confirmPublishBody: "{{title}}" will go live immediately and be visible to customers.
createQuick.subtitle: Built for speed: complete this flow in under a minute.
createQuick.prefillFromAiCompose: Draft loaded from AI. Review and publish when ready.
createQuick.prefillFromMenuOffer: Draft loaded from your menu offer. Review and publish when ready.
createQuick.prefillFromReuse: Fields loaded from a past deal. Adjust and publish.
createQuick.prefillFromCreateHub: AI drafted your deal. Review the details and publish when ready.
createQuick.previewHint: This is how your deal will look to customers.

language.sectionAppHelp: Controls menus, settings, and browse experience.
language.sectionBusinessHelp: Defaults to Same as app. Set English, Spanish, or Korean to override for AI ads and publish tips only.

account.title: Account
account.alertsEnableHint: Enable notifications to receive deal alerts.
account.dealAlertsSubtitle: Notify me when favorites post new deals.
account.bizProfileHelp: Core details help customers and AI. Name, contact, email, phone, address, category, and hours are required to save.
account.errBizCoreRequired: Fill in business name, contact, email, phone, address, category, and hours.
account.errBizNameAddress: Business name and address are required.
account.fieldLatLngHelp: Lets customers sort by distance with Near me. Leave blank if unsure — Location text still helps.
account.phShortDescription: One or two sentences about your business
account.createBizCardBody: Create a business to post deals and redeem QR codes.
account.logoutConfirmBody: You’ll need to sign in again to claim deals or manage your business.
account.errCoordsBoth: Set both latitude and longitude, or clear both.
account.profileSaved: Business profile saved. AI ads will use this when set.
account.errLoginForBiz: Please log in to create a business.
account.bizSignInToContinue: Sign in to continue your one-time setup and launch your first deal.
account.bizSetupComplete: Setup complete — ready to launch BOGO deals!
account.bizSetupFinish: Finish your setup to unlock create, redeem, and dashboard.
account.bizSetupStart: Complete your one-time setup to start launching deals.
account.profileHintCategory: Add your category so customers can filter and find you
account.profileHintHours: Add your hours to help customers plan their visit
account.profileHintDescription: Add a short description to introduce your business
account.profileHintPhone: Add your phone number so customers can reach you
account.profileHintContact: Add a contact name for a personal touch
account.profileHintEmail: Add your business email for professional communication
account.profileHintAddress: Add your address so customers can find you
account.profileHintName: Add your business name to get started
account.aiDescGenerated: Description generated by AI. Review and save.
account.aiDescNeedsNameCategory: Add a business name and category first.

settingsScreen.title: Settings
settingsScreen.alertsPermissionBody: Enable notifications to receive deal alerts.
settingsScreen.alertsExpoGoBody: Expo Go on Android can’t use full push setup. Use a development or preview build for notification permission, or continue without alerts.

createHub.title: Create
createHub.loginPrompt: Please log in to create deals.
createHub.createBusinessBody: Create a business to post deals and redeem QR codes.
createHub.bizProfilePending: Business profile found. Finalizing your business account record. You can still start creating a deal.
createHub.errLoginBusiness: Please log in to create a business.
createHub.menuDealFastSubtitle: Pick items from your saved menu and get 3 AI ad options.
createHub.quickDealSubtitle: Type your offer, set the schedule, and publish.
createHub.aiAdsSubtitle: Photo + short note → 3 distinct ad options. Pick one and publish.
createHub.templatesEmpty: No templates yet. Save one from AI Deal.
createHub.aiComposeSubtitle: Photo, type, or speak → 2 ad options for one offer → Quick publish.
createHub.reuseSubtitle: Relaunch a template or past offer in a few taps.
createHub.templatesLoadError: Could not load templates. Pull down to retry.
createHub.scanMenuSubtitle: Photo of your menu → save items for faster offers.
createHub.menuOfferSubtitle: Pick items → 3 AI ad ideas → publish.
createHub.menuManagerSubtitle: View, edit, add, or archive saved menu lines.
createHub.subtitle: Describe your deal and we'll handle the rest.
createHub.offerInputPlaceholder: e.g. Buy one latte, get one free
createHub.errAiCreateFailed: Couldn't generate your deal. Try again or create manually.
createHub.newDealSub: Photo, voice, or text — AI creates your ad
createHub.reuseDealSub: Relaunch a template or past offer

menuScan.title: Scan menu
menuScan.cameraPermissionDenied: Camera access is needed to take a menu photo. Enable it in Settings → TWOFER → Camera.
menuScan.lowLegibility: Some text was hard to read. Edit the list before saving.
menuScan.emptyExtract: No items found. Try a clearer photo or add lines manually.
menuScan.strongDealHint: Deals must meet Twofer's strong-deal rule (40%+ off, BOGO, or a free item). You'll choose the exact offer on the next screen.
menuScan.errScan: Could not read menu. Try again.
menuScan.photoPermissionDenied: Photo library access is needed to pick a menu image.
menuScan.multiHint: Pick one or many photos — AI extracts lines from each.
menuScan.skipDupLabel: Skip lines already in your library
menuScan.allDuplicatesInLibrary: Every line matches something already saved. Turn off “skip duplicates” to add anyway, or edit names.
menuScan.savedWithSkipped: Saved {{count}} new lines ({{skipped}} skipped — already in library).

menuOffer.title: Menu offer
menuOffer.stepMain: Which item would you like to run the ad on?
menuOffer.stepPaired: What do you want to pair it with?
menuOffer.generateStrongSubtitle: Twofer only allows strong deals — 40%+ off, BOGO, 2-for-1, or a free item with purchase.
menuOffer.adsOptionalRefine: Optional: use Refine with AI on any card to tweak wording in chat.
menuOffer.errNeedPairedFree: Pick what’s free (or tap Same menu item) — this offer type needs a paired item.
menuOffer.pickHelp: Each option uses a different angle. Offer facts stay the same.
menuOffer.errGenerate: Could not generate ads. Try again.
menuOffer.locationHelp: Each deal is tied to a store. Pro: one location. Premium: up to three.
menuOffer.multiLocationToggle: Apply this same deal to multiple locations?
menuOffer.sameItemPaired: Same menu item (BOGO on one item)
menuOffer.errPercentWeak: Twofer needs at least 40% off for this type — pick 40% or higher.
menuOffer.errFixedPrice: Enter a valid dollar amount for the special price.

menuWorkflow.errSchema: Menu storage is not set up on this server yet. Ask your admin to run the latest database migration.
menuWorkflow.errMonthlyLimit: You've reached the monthly AI limit. It resets on the 1st — try again then or edit copy manually.

adRefine.title: Refine ad
adRefine.placeholder: e.g. Make it shorter, mention mornings…
adRefine.emptySession: Nothing to refine. Go back and generate ads first.
adRefine.errRefine: Could not apply edit. Try again.
adRefine.errInvalidVariant: This ad option is unavailable. Go back and open Refine from the menu offer screen again.

aiCompose.title: AI offer
aiCompose.subtitle: Photo, type, or speak — we build the ad.
aiCompose.promptPlaceholder: e.g. BOGO iced latte next hour, or slow afternoon pastry push
aiCompose.micHint: Tap mic to speak — we turn it into text you can edit before generating.
aiCompose.useThisOption: Use this · edit in Quick Deal
aiCompose.duplicateCached: Showing your recent result for the same request.
aiCompose.lowConfidence: Please double-check the item or wording. {{reason}}
aiCompose.quotaExceededTitle: AI generations used for this month
aiCompose.quotaExceededBody: You’ve used your AI generations for this month. Reuse a saved ad or repeat a past deal — it’s fast and doesn’t use a new AI generation.
aiCompose.profileIncomplete: Add your business name and address on Account before using AI.
aiCompose.cooldownGenerate: Please wait about a minute between AI generations.
aiCompose.cooldownTranscribe: Please wait a few seconds between voice notes.
aiCompose.errNeedInput: Add a photo, type a request, or record voice first.
aiCompose.errPhotoPermission: Allow photo access to attach a menu image.
aiCompose.errImageRead: Could not read that image. Try another photo.
aiCompose.errMicPermission: Allow microphone access to dictate your offer.
aiCompose.transcribeDone: Voice added to the text field — edit if needed, then generate.
aiCompose.errCameraPermission: Allow camera access to snap a photo.
aiCompose.posterImageUnavailable: We couldn’t generate a poster image this time (API or storage). Add a photo above and generate again, or continue — you can publish with a photo on the next screen.

reuseHub.title: Reuse & repeat
reuseHub.subtitle: Templates open in full AI Deal. Past deals load into Quick Deal to tweak and publish.

dealDetail.title: Deal
dealDetail.couldNotLoad: We couldn’t load this deal. It may have ended or been removed.

redeem.title: Redeem
redeem.loginPrompt: Please log in to redeem deals.
redeem.createBody: Set up your business to redeem customer tickets.
redeem.errLogin: Please log in to create a business.
redeem.scanPrimaryHint: Scan the customer’s QR first — fastest at the counter.
redeem.manualFallbackHint: Use this if the camera isn’t available. Enter the 6-character code from their Wallet verify screen.
redeem.manualHelp: Ask the customer to open Wallet → verify screen. Enter the 6-character code, then tap Redeem.
redeem.cameraRequired: Camera permission is required to scan QR codes.
redeem.errCodeRequired: Enter the claim code from the customer’s wallet.

auth.title: Login
auth.errRateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a few minutes and try again, or use a development build with the demo account pre-seeded (see docs/DEMO_SEED.md).
auth.errNetwork: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
auth.errDemoNotProvisioned: Demo account is not set up in this Supabase project. Run once: npm run seed:demo (service role), or create demo@demo.com with password demo12345 in the Auth dashboard.
auth.alertSignUpSuccessMsg: Check your email to confirm, then log in.
auth.createBusinessBody: Create a business to post deals and redeem QR codes.
auth.alertLoginRequiredMsg: Please log in to create a business.
auth.alertBizCreatedMsg: You can now create deals and redeem QR codes.

authLanding.title: TWOFER
authLanding.subtitle: First entry — live local deals. Log in or create an account to browse, claim, and redeem.
authLanding.subtitleBusiness: First entry — live local deals. Log in or create an account to publish offers and grow your customer base.
authLanding.roleTitle: Choose business or consumer, then sign in.
authLanding.roleSubtitle: We’ll use this for the right onboarding after you log in or create an account.
authLanding.roleCustomerHint: Browse deals, save favorites, claim, and redeem.
authLanding.roleBusinessHint: Create offers, manage your shop, and redeem customer tickets.
authLanding.languageHelp: English by default. Spanish and Korean available.
authLanding.legalFooter: By continuing you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.
authLanding.errNoAccount: No account found with that email.
authLanding.errAlreadyExists: An account with that email already exists. Try logging in.
authLanding.errRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
authLanding.errNetwork: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
authLanding.errPasswordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
authLanding.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
authLanding.verifyEmailBody: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Open it to verify your account, then log in.
authLanding.hintEnterBoth: Enter your email and password to continue.

legal.authFooterHint: By signing up you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
legal.businessSetupHint: Creating a business account is subject to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account?
deleteAccount.body: This permanently removes your TWOFER account. If you created a business, its deals and related claim history will also be removed.
deleteAccount.bodyConsumer: This permanently removes your TWOFER account and signs you out. This cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.errFailed: We could not delete your account. Try again or contact support.
deleteAccount.sectionBody: Permanently delete your account and sign out. This cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.sectionBodyConsumer: Permanently delete your shopper account and sign out. This cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.businessOwnerBlockedBody: Your login is linked to a business profile. In-app account deletion isn’t available. Contact support so we can help you remove your login safely.
deleteAccount.businessOwnerBlockedShort: Business accounts can’t be deleted in the app. Contact support.
deleteAccount.ownershipAmbiguousBlockedBody: We couldn’t confirm whether your account is linked to a business. To delete your login safely, contact support.
deleteAccount.fallbackWebHint: If in-app deletion isn’t available or doesn’t work, you can request account deletion on our website.
deleteAccount.fallbackWebBody: You can complete or request account deletion on our website.

merchantInsights.claimBlockedMix: Claim blocks (why shoppers could not claim)
merchantInsights.hourHeat: Claims by hour (local to each deal)
merchantInsights.hourHeatSparse: Not enough claims yet for a clear hourly pattern.

passwordRecovery.forgotSubtitle: Enter the email you use for TWOFER. If an account exists, we’ll email you a reset link.
passwordRecovery.requestSuccess: If an account exists for that email, we sent a password reset link.
passwordRecovery.requestGenericError: We couldn’t send a reset email right now. Try again in a moment.
passwordRecovery.resetSubtitle: Pick a strong password you haven’t used elsewhere.
passwordRecovery.errPasswordRequired: Enter and confirm your new password.
passwordRecovery.errPasswordMin: Password must be at least {{min}} characters.
passwordRecovery.resetSuccess: Your password was updated. You can continue in the app.
passwordRecovery.resetGenericError: We couldn’t update your password. Try again or request a new link.
passwordRecovery.invalidSession: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one from sign-in.

createAi.loginPrompt: Please log in to create deals.
createAi.needBusiness: Create a business to use AI ad ideas.
createAi.intro: Add a photo of the item. A short offer note helps, but you can leave it blank — we’ll read the photo.
createAi.demoModeBody: For demo@demo.com, ad ideas use built-in templates (no OpenAI) unless your project sets Edge secrets OPENAI_API_KEY and AI_ADS_DEMO_USE_LIVE=true. Publishing the deal does not call OpenAI. Other accounts need OPENAI_API_KEY for real AI ads.
createAi.devToolsIntro: Dev-only — shows right under the intro (no QA panel needed). Tests edge functions besides “Generate 3 ad ideas”. Needs photo + hint on screen for ai-create-deal.
createAi.devCreateConfirmMsg: Inserts a real deal row. poster_url may be a short-lived signed URL—prefer publishing from this screen instead.
createAi.qaHelp: Tag runs for the 12 test cases (see docs/ai-ad-validation). Appears in Supabase function logs and dev analytics. Optional — leave blank for normal use.
createAi.qaActiveTag: Active tag: {{tag}} — cards will show QA lane_id for screenshots.
createAi.photoHint: Add a clear photo of the dish, drink, or item—AI uses it to stay accurate.
createAi.refreshLimitReached: You've revised this ad enough times — start fresh with a new offer.
createAi.generatingHint: Researching the item, writing copy, and producing the image. Usually under half a minute.
createAi.generatingWithPhoto: Researching the item, writing copy, and polishing your photo...
createAi.generatingNoPhoto: Researching the item, writing copy, and generating an image...
createAi.photoPolishTitle: How should we polish your photo?
createAi.photoPolishHelp: Studio polish is recommended — costs about the same as generating a new photo, and uses your real product.
createAi.reviseErrPickSomething: Pick a preset or describe what to change.
createAi.errMicPermission: Microphone permission is required for voice input.
createAi.errRecordingStart: Could not start recording. Try again.
createAi.transcribeDone: Voice transcribed and added to your description.
createAi.transcribeCooldown: Please wait a moment before recording again.
createAi.quotaRemaining: {{remaining}} of {{limit}} AI uses left this month
createAi.quotaWarning: Only {{remaining}} AI uses remaining this month.
createAi.prefillFromReuse: Deal prefilled from your past deals.
createAi.prefillFromHub: Deal prefilled. Add a photo and generate your ad!
createAi.errUnexpectedAiResponse: Unexpected response from AI. Try again.
createAi.fallbackIntro: We couldn’t generate ads right now. You can still finish this offer manually.
createAi.fallbackBody: Your photo and offer note stay put. Open the title, subheadline, CTA, and details below, then publish — or adjust the note and tap Generate again.
createAi.manualDraftBanner: Fill in title and description yourself, then publish when ready.
createAi.pickAdHelp: Value = savings clarity · Neighborhood = local & regulars · Premium = quality & craft. Tap "Use this ad" to load one into your draft.
createAi.variantListingBodyLabel: Full listing text (what shoppers see under your headline)
createAi.variantNeedsPhotoForPreview: Add a photo above to preview your ad with the image.
createAi.menuOfferScheduleHint: Set when this offer runs below — one-time dates or a recurring weekly window — then generate ads and publish.
createAi.errMaxClaims: Max claims must be greater than 0.
createAi.errCutoff: Cutoff buffer must be 0 or more.
createAi.errEndAfterStart: End time must be after start time.
createAi.errRecurringDay: Select at least one day for recurring deals.
createAi.errRecurringWindow: Recurring window start must be before end.
createAi.errAddHint: Please add a few words about the deal.
createAi.errRegenClientLimit: You’ve used both free refreshes for this draft. Tap “Generate 3 ad ideas” for a new batch, or edit the text below.
createAi.errUnexpectedAi: Unexpected response from AI. Try again.
createAi.successBatchNew: New batch ready — value, neighborhood, and quality angles. Pick one to load into your draft.
createAi.successBatchFirst: Three angles: value, neighborhood, and premium. Pick one—you can edit before publishing.
createAi.errPublishDraft: Please generate or enter title and description.
createAi.errPublishDraftFirst: Please generate or enter title and description first.
createAi.errPublishPermission: Permission denied. Make sure you own this business.
createAi.errPublishPhoto: Photo upload failed. Try picking a new photo.
createAi.errPublishNetwork: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
createAi.friendlyOpenaiConfig: AI isn’t configured on the server yet. You can still write your deal below.
createAi.friendlySession: Session expired. Log in again, then try generating.
createAi.friendlyPhoto: We couldn’t use that photo. Try taking or picking a new one.
createAi.friendlyRegenLimit: You’ve used the free refreshes for this draft. Tap Generate 3 ad ideas for a new batch, or edit below.
createAi.friendlyRateLimit: Too many requests. Wait a moment and try again.
createAi.friendlyGenerationRateLimit: We couldn’t generate ads right now. You can still finish this offer manually. The service may be busy — try again shortly or fill in the fields below.
createAi.friendlyGenerationLongError: We couldn’t generate ads right now. You can still finish this offer manually. Try again in a moment, or fill in the fields below.

errorBoundary.appBody: The app hit an unexpected error. You can try again.
errorBoundary.mapBody: The map could not load. Try again or browse deals from the Home tab.

commonUi.invalidDealLinkBody: This deal link is not valid.

consumerWallet.title: My Wallet
consumerWallet.note: Active tickets are single-use and expire automatically.
consumerWallet.emptyActiveSub: Claim offers to see them here.
consumerWallet.emptyEndedSub: Redeemed or expired tickets appear here.
consumerWallet.guestSubtitle: Log in to see claims and QR codes.
consumerWallet.emptyLoginMessage: Log in to see deals you've claimed and open your QR at checkout.
consumerWallet.loadError: Couldn’t load your wallet. Try again.
consumerWallet.qrExpired: This QR expired. Get a fresh one to redeem.
consumerWallet.errNoDealForQr: Claim a deal first to refresh the QR.
consumerWallet.emptyClaimsSub: Claim an offer from Home — it will appear here with your QR.
consumerWallet.subtitle: Use Deal at checkout, or open QR as a backup. Ended tickets are below.
consumerWallet.useDealBody: Slide to confirm — we’ll show a short live pass for staff. Your deal is marked used when the pass finishes.
consumerWallet.slideHint: Slide right to confirm — avoids accidental taps in line.
consumerWallet.passStaffHint: Clock and countdown update live — harder to fake than a screenshot.
consumerWallet.passCompleteError: Could not finish. Check connection and try from Wallet again.
consumerWallet.passCancelBody: You can start again from your wallet when ready.
consumerWallet.passCloseEarlyBody: This deal is already activated. You can close the screen — it will finish automatically within about 30 seconds.
consumerWallet.errBeginRedeem: Could not start using this deal.
consumerWallet.verifyStaffHint: Live clock updates every second — harder to fake than a screenshot.

consumerDealDetail.proPerksBody: Unlock saved favorites alerts and early access to new offers.
consumerDealDetail.soldOutBanner: Sold out. This offer has reached its limit.
consumerDealDetail.claimedBanner: Offer claimed. Your ticket is ready.
consumerDealDetail.claimErrorBanner: Unable to claim right now. Please try again.

consumerQr.step1: Show this QR code to the staff
consumerQr.step2: They will scan it to verify
consumerQr.redeemedBannerMsg: This ticket has already been used.

consumerNotifications.title: Notifications
consumerNotifications.emptySub: We'll notify you when favorites go live.

businessDashboard.insightEmpty: Create your first offer to see performance insights here.

businessDashboard.multiOfferBody: Upgrade to Pro to run multiple live offers at once.

businessScan.headerSub: Point camera at customer's QR code
businessScan.hint: Position the QR code within the frame to scan

businessAiSelection.title: Review Offer
businessAiSelection.introBody: We generated a few options based on your prompt. Pick one and edit later.
businessAiSelection.selectBody: Please choose one of the AI-generated options
businessAiSelection.publishedBody: Your offer is now live and visible to customers.
businessAiSelection.confirmBody: You can edit details later from your offers list.

businessTemplates.title: Reuse Offer
businessTemplates.emptySub: Create your first offer and it will show up here as a reusable template.

businessNotifications.title: Notifications
businessNotifications.emptySub: We'll notify you when offers go live or get redeemed.
businessNotifications.proBody: Unlock automated favorite alerts and advanced notification rules.

createDeal.title: Create Offer
createDeal.photoSub: Add a photo to make your offer stand out
createDeal.promptSub: Use plain language (BOGO or free item only)
createDeal.promptPlaceholder: e.g., Buy one coffee, get one free
createDeal.recurringDays: Choose the days and window for your recurring offer
createDeal.alertCameraBody: Camera permission is required to take photos
createDeal.alertHintBody: Please add a hint for your offer
createDeal.alertAiBody: AI drafts are available for BOGO or free-item offers only.
createDeal.alertDaysBody: Pick at least one day of the week
createDeal.alertWindowBody: Enter a valid start and end time

offersDashboard.subtitle: This month at a glance · tap a deal for details
offersDashboard.periodHint: Figures reflect the current calendar month unless noted.
offersDashboard.loginPrompt: Please log in to view your dashboard.
offersDashboard.needBusiness: Create a business to unlock analytics.
offersDashboard.chartFooter: Based on claim time in your time zone.

offersDashboard.templatesReuseSubtitle: Saved templates, recurring patterns, and past deals — open to start from one.

consumerProfile.title: Quick profile
consumerProfile.subtitle: Your birthday and ZIP help us show relevant offers — then we’ll set up location and alerts.
consumerProfile.editSubtitle: Change your ZIP or birthday anytime.
consumerProfile.birthdateHint: Used only to group offers by age band — merchants never see your exact birthday.
consumerProfile.errZipInvalid: Use a valid 5-digit US ZIP (optional ZIP+4).

businessSetup.title: Set up your business
businessSetup.subtitle: Pick category and hours from chips — only a few lines to type.
businessSetup.shortDescriptionPh: e.g., Neighborhood coffee shop · fast pickup · family-owned
businessSetup.errRequired: Fill in every field (use chips where you can).
businessSetup.errNameAddress: Business name and address are required.
businessSetup.errSave: Could not create business. Try again.
businessSetup.noResults: No results found. Enter your info manually.
businessSetup.lookupError: Lookup failed. Enter your info manually.
businessSetup.infoFilled: Info filled! Review and edit if needed.
businessSetup.estimatedInfo: Info is estimated — please verify before saving.
businessSetup.setupComplete: Setup complete — ready to launch BOGO deals!

settingsConsumer.editSub: ZIP and birthday — saved to your account.

billing.paywallExpiredMessage: Your trial has ended. Reactivate your account to continue creating deals.
billing.pilotTrialBody: Subscriptions launch with v1.1. You'll keep full access to all features through the pilot — we'll email you well before billing starts.

aiInsights.title: AI Insights
aiInsights.noSuggestions: No suggestions available yet — create a deal first!

walkthrough.dashboardBody: This is your home base. See all your deals, track claims and redemptions, and monitor how your business is doing at a glance.
walkthrough.createBody: Launch BOGO deals in seconds. Set the offer, pick a schedule, and your deal goes live to nearby customers instantly.
walkthrough.trackBody: Watch redemptions roll in, see which deals work best, and use insights to keep customers coming back.
walkthrough.aiLoading: Generating a deal idea for you...
